buildSteps.label: Sobel-X catches vertical edges
buildSteps.description: Brightness changes from left to right: the sides of buildings, poles, door frames

buildSteps.label: Sobel-Y catches horizontal edges
buildSteps.description: Brightness changes from top to bottom: horizons, shelves, table edges

buildSteps.label: Combine them for ALL edges
buildSteps.description: Edge magnitude = sqrt(Gx² + Gy²). This gives us the overall edge strength at every pixel, regardless of direction

buildSteps.label: That's the Sobel operator!
buildSteps.description: Two kernels + one formula = a complete edge detector. Simple, fast, and still widely used in computer vision today.
